note: Switched from freemium_subscription to paid app ($4.99) after Apple rejection (Guideline 3.1.2(c) EULA missing + 1.1.6 misleading 'Start Free Trial' CTA). Per sales data, ElderEase/Smart Cards both ship as $4.99 paid apps. All IAP / RevenueCat / Paywall code removed from the app binary.

revenuecat.note: RevenueCat no longer invoked — SDK removed from package.json, initPurchases/Paywall deleted from codebase.

paywall.note: app/paywall.tsx deleted. src/utils/purchases.ts deleted. All isPro gating removed; every feature is unlocked for all paid users.
